Name: DAMAGE_ATTACK_TYPE_RATE_PARAM
Description: Defines damage scaling multipliers for specific attack types, including separate scaling applied when a target or object is in a broken or destroyed state.

Fields.Name: Multiplier
Fields.Description: Base damage multiplier applied for the associated attack type.

Fields.Name: Broken State Multiplier
Fields.Description: Damage multiplier applied when the target, guard, or destructible object is in a broken or destroyed state.
